PROJ_PATH='/c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/JX1/S80/S80 - 192.168.0.218.vbproj'
MSBUILD='/c/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe'

cd /c/Users/Administrator/Desktop/JX1/S80

# 먼저 상태 확인
echo "=== 프로젝트 파일 존재 확인 ===" 
test -f "$PROJ_PATH" && echo "OK" || echo "NOT FOUND"

pwsh -NoProfile -Command "& '$MSBUILD' '$PROJ_PATH' /p:Configuration=Release /p:Platform=AnyCPU /v:normal"
